titles.en: Chapter on the Superiority of the Married Person Over the Unmarried Person
Chapter on the Superiority of the Married Person Over the Unmarried Person

segments: : "رَكْعَتَانِ يُصَلِّيهِمَا مُتَزَوِّجٌ أَفْضَلُ مِنْ سَبْعِينَ رَكْعَةً يُصَلِّيهِمَا أَعْزَبُ ".
arabic.text: : "رَكْعَتَانِ يُصَلِّيهِمَا مُتَزَوِّجٌ أَفْضَلُ مِنْ سَبْعِينَ رَكْعَةً يُصَلِّيهِمَا أَعْزَبُ ".

segments:
Hadith.4346 - Abdullah ibn Maymun narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) from his father, Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) (peace be upon them), who said:
"Two units of prayer performed by a married person are better than seventy units of prayer performed by an unmarried person."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.4346 - Abdullah ibn Maymun narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) from his father, Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) (peace be upon them), who said:
"Two units of prayer performed by a married person are better than seventy units of prayer performed by an unmarried person."

narratorChain.raw: 4346 - رَوَى عَبْدُ اَللَّهِ بْنُ مَيْمُونٍ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on the Superiority of the Married Person Over the Unmarried Person

segments: 4347 - قَالَ وَ قَالَ اَلنَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "لَرَكْعَتَانِ يُصَلِّيهِمَا مُتَزَوِّجٌ أَفْضَلُ مِنْ رَجُلٍ عَزَبٍ يَقُومُ لَيْلَهُ وَ يَصُومُ نَهَارَهُ ".
arabic.text: 4347 - قَالَ وَ قَالَ اَلنَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "لَرَكْعَتَانِ يُصَلِّيهِمَا مُتَزَوِّجٌ أَفْضَلُ مِنْ رَجُلٍ عَزَبٍ يَقُومُ لَيْلَهُ وَ يَصُومُ نَهَارَهُ ".

segments:
Hadith.4347 - The Prophet (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"Two units of prayer performed by a married person are better than an unmarried man who spends his nights in prayer and his days fasting."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.4347 - The Prophet (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"Two units of prayer performed by a married person are better than an unmarried man who spends his nights in prayer and his days fasting."

titles.en: Chapter on the Superiority of the Married Person Over the Unmarried Person

segments: 4348 - وَ رُوِيَ أَنَّ رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ قَالَ: "إِنَّ أَرَاذِلَ مَوْتَاكُمُ اَلْعُزَّابُ".
arabic.text: 4348 - وَ رُوِيَ أَنَّ رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ قَالَ: "إِنَّ أَرَاذِلَ مَوْتَاكُمُ اَلْعُزَّابُ".

segments: Hadith.4348 - It is narrated that the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said: "Indeed, the most despicable of your dead are the unmarried."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Hadith.4348 - It is narrated that the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said: "Indeed, the most despicable of your dead are the unmarried."

narratorChain.raw: 4348 - وَ رُوِيَ أَنَّ رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on the Superiority of the Married Person Over the Unmarried Person

segments: 4349 - وَ رُوِيَ أَنَّ رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ قَالَ: "أَكْثَرُ أَهْلِ اَلنَّارِ اَلْعُزَّابُ".
arabic.text: 4349 - وَ رُوِيَ أَنَّ رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ قَالَ: "أَكْثَرُ أَهْلِ اَلنَّارِ اَلْعُزَّابُ".

segments: Hadith.4349 - It has been narrated that the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings be upon him and his family) said: "The majority of the inhabitants of the Fire are the unmarried."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Hadith.4349 - It has been narrated that the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings be upon him and his family) said: "The majority of the inhabitants of the Fire are the unmarried."

narratorChain.raw: 4349 - وَ رُوِيَ أَنَّ رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ قَالَ
